creator: Trond.Endrestol@ximalas.info
text:
Created attachment 249669
Patch for lang/gcc14-devel moving libgccjit.h and libgccjit++.h out of the way

This port built with the patch applied, and more importantly, installed successfully while lang/gcc13 was present. I'll leave the patch here in case someone else comes by and figure out they need it too.
